title: BigBear.ai Builds Federal AI Backlog As Investors Weigh Volatile Returns
text: BigBear.ai Holdings (NYSE: BBAI) is strengthening its position in federal AI spending through strategic acquisitions and contract wins. The company has secured a significant classified federal AI contract with the intelligence community and acquired Ask Sage to expand its generative AI capabilities. These moves are contributing to backlog growth and positioning the company for revenue expansion. Additional wins include new contracts for generative AI applications in airport trade and travel scenarios. Management is executing organizational realignments focused on capitalizing on federal AI demand. BigBear.ai has achieved strong gross margin expansion supported by a growing backlog, signaling operational progress despite broader market volatility. The stock trades at $4.14, approximately 22% below the $5.33 analyst consensus target. Year-to-date performance shows a 29.1% decline, though the stock gained about 15.6% over the past month. Analysts note the company remains unprofitable with shareholder dilution as a significant risk. The key watchpoint will be how effectively the growing backlog converts into revenue while maintaining margin performance.
